dr_question: As per the report by the U.S. Census Bureau's indication of a rise in food service sales since August 2024, how can Lee’s Market optimize in-store layouts and product displays across its U.S. locations to increase bakery sales by 15% by the end of Q1 2026?

question_source.dr_question: As per the report by the U.S. Census Bureau's indication of a rise in food service sales since August 2024, how can Lee’s Market optimize in-store layouts and product displays across its U.S. locations to increase bakery sales by 15% by the end of Q1 2026?
